title: GoalOS Signoff Pro public demonstration labs v22-v29

labs.title: Action Graph & Human Authority Lab
labs.proof: Decision → scoped actions → authority gate → rollback → receipt.
labs.audience: Executives, reviewers, compliance teams, AI delivery leads.
labs.promise: Shows why GoalOS prepares action, but does not self-authorize high-impact action.

labs.title: Proof-Carrying Artifact & Evolution Ledger Lab
labs.proof: Candidate artifact → proof gates → immutable version → evolution ledger → upgrade right.
labs.audience: Product teams, AI platform teams, governance stewards.
labs.promise: Shows how reusable capability earns the right to influence future work.

labs.title: Independent Replay & Claim Promotion Lab
labs.proof: Proof packet → independent replay → challenge window → claim maturity promotion.
labs.audience: Research reviewers, auditors, grant evaluators, technical diligence teams.
labs.promise: Shows that one run is not proof; replay makes a claim institutionally usable.

labs.title: ProofZero Planning & Evidence Reanalyze Lab
labs.proof: Latent work state → bounded search → validator-aware backup → evidence reanalysis.
labs.audience: AI operators, mission designers, evaluation teams.
labs.promise: Shows how GoalOS plans over proof-relevant work states instead of persuasive futures.

labs.title: Proof-Gated Mission Foundry & Curriculum Lab
labs.proof: Accepted proof → mission seeds → interestingness filter → quarantine/admission → harder mission.
labs.audience: Program owners, frontier evaluation teams, autonomous work architects.
labs.promise: Shows how accepted proof becomes curriculum rather than a dead artifact.

labs.title: Process-Resolved Evidence Lab
labs.proof: Trace steps → claim lineage → tool scope → contradiction pass → validator report.
labs.audience: Corporate reviewers, analysts, legal/compliance observers, AI assurance teams.
labs.promise: Shows that final output is not enough; process-resolved evidence determines review readiness.

labs.title: Blockchain Credibility Standard Lab
labs.proof: Mission → Evidence → Replay → Validation → Human Signoff → Receipt → Settlement readiness.
labs.audience: Blockchain teams, DAOs, foundations, auditors, validators, investors, users.
labs.promise: Shows why credible blockchain projects need proof packages before trust, reputation, governance, or settlement readiness.

labs.title: Blockchain Proof Mandate & Due Diligence Lab
labs.proof: Trust request → proof request → due diligence scorecard → policy gate → receipt-ready decision.
labs.audience: Users, DAO delegates, grant committees, treasury councils, auditors, investors, partners, enterprises, exchanges.
labs.promise: Turns the blockchain credibility standard into a concrete requirement everyone can ask for, score, and enforce.
